spec.name: The Statue's Room
spec.description: Here, the passage enters a small room. Exits lead to the east and south, and you notice a wonderful, large (and tastefully done) statue to the north.

east.description: A long hallway, ending in a set of steps.

south.description: The hall extends to the south where it seems to lighten somewhat.

extra_descs.description: Upon closer inspection you see that the statue has a small plaque affixed to it. The face looks remarkably familiar also.
It says: Maynard, Death Jester of the Harlequins
